title: Unwanted document multiplying
excerpt: I have something occurring on an automation that moves an item to a new board. When it does this, it moves the files (images) as well. So when the item gets to the new board, there are two of every document. Any help wou…

posts.author: tdmorin (Trevor)
posts.cookedHtml: I have something occurring on an automation that moves an item to a new board. When it does this, it moves the files (images) as well. So when the item gets to the new board, there are two of every document. Any help would be appreciated.
